name: RPlog_The_Musician_and_the_News-Caster-Thingy
title: The Musician and the News-Caster-Thingy
summary: On Nar Shaddaa's Corellia-themed tourist level, the smooth-talking dealer Ecks, also called Kracen, completes the sale of a hand-crafted Alderaanian vase before his attention is captured by the strange, honey-toned music of the golden-hued street musician Lily. Charmed and intensely curious, Ecks approaches and apologizes for startling her, peppering her with admiring questions about her violin-like instrument and her nameless song. The eccentric, childlike Lily responds with whimsical non-sequiturs about twins, names, and casinos, gradually warming to the formal-spoken man whom she insists sounds like a "news caster thingy." Their odd, gentle exchange wanders through art, scent, and the limits of her tired arms until a chime from Ecks's datapad calls him away to business. He bids Lily a sincere farewell, hoping to meet again, and she skips off into the crowd.
